title: State Denies Parental Recognition Based on Family Structure
description: A state refuses to recognize the parental status of a lawfully formed same-sex married couple and treats one parent as a legal stranger to the child solely because of the sex and family structure of the parents. The scenario tests whether Article V protects family autonomy and parental recognition from discriminatory government interference.

details.family: a married same-sex couple raising a child born during the marriage
